description: Superpowers Flow Enforcer - Hooks to prevent skipping workflow phases

hooks.prompt: Read $USER_PROMPT and state file at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If user asks to skip brainstorming/tdd/review/finishing and exceptions.user_confirmed is not true, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "检测到跳过流程请求。请先明确确认：确认跳过 <phase>，并给出原因。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Enforce TDD in this order: (1) If path is test-like (contains test/tests/spec/__tests__ or name has .test. .spec. _test. _spec.), return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"Writing test file allowed."}. (2) If path matches exception patterns (*.md, docs/*, *.json, *.yaml, *.yml, *.config.*, .env*, *.d.ts, types/*.ts, *.types.ts, dist/*, build/*, docs/superpowers/specs/*, docs/superpowers/plans/*), return allow. (3) If exceptions.skip_tdd and exceptions.user_confirmed are both true, return allow. (4) Otherwise treat as production file: infer candidate tests (same basename with .test/.spec). If no candidate appears in tdd.tests_verified_fail, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST. 先写测试并运行到失败。"}. Else return allow.

Read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If current_phase is brainstorming and brainstorming.skill_invoked is true, and brainstorming.findings_updated is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Brainstorming 阶段每次提问后必须更新 findings.md。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If file path matches docs/superpowers/specs/*.md and brainstorming.spec_self_reviewed is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "SPEC 已写入，必须先完成 Self-Review 并让用户批准后再进入 planning。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If file path matches docs/superpowers/plans/*.md and worktree.created is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Plan 已写完，先执行 using-git-worktrees 创建隔离工作区并跑 baseline tests。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.command and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If command contains 'git worktree add' and worktree.baseline_tests_passed is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Worktree 已创建，必须先完成 setup 和 baseline tests。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If task status is completed and review.tasks[task_id] is missing or not fully passed (spec_review_passed/code_review_passed), return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Task 标记完成前，必须完成两阶段 review。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_RESULT and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If result contains test failure indicators (FAIL, failed, Error, assertion) and debugging.active is not true, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "检测到测试失败，请先执行 systematic-debugging 再改代码。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json and transcript at $TRANSCRIPT_PATH. If interrupt.allowed is true, return {"decision": "approve", "systemMessage": "Interrupt recorded."}. Otherwise if completion keywords appear (done/complete/tests pass/fixed/working/完成/修复) but no fresh passing verification evidence in the latest context, return {"decision": "block", "reason": "Completion claimed without fresh verification evidence. Run verification now and show output."}. Else return {"decision": "approve"}.

Read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If interrupt.allowed is true, return {"decision": "approve"}. If all tasks in review.tasks are fully passed and finishing.skill_invoked is false, return {"decision": "block", "reason": "所有任务都已 review，通过后还需执行 finishing-a-development-branch。"}. Otherwise return {"decision": "approve"}.
